title: The Cat's Pajamas
writer: Ernest Vajda, Hope Loring, Louis D. Lighton
actors: Betty Bronson, Ricardo Cortez, Arlette Marchal
plot: Sally, seamstress for a fashionable modiste, supports a crippled father and adores her kitten, Tommy. Though loved by Jack a taxi driver, she is infatuated with Don Cesare Gracco, an operatic sensation.
